calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: SD-037 Broadcast Override Regulator -- 4-arm validation
items.note: 4-arm factorial {SD-036, SD-037} x {OFF, ON} with PAG always on. Validates orexin-analog broadcast override regulator: PWS-hyperphagia signature (ON_ON >= 2x ON_OFF approach-commit) and narcolepsy/cataplexy signature (OFF_OFF < 30% ON_OFF). Defaults seeded by orexin kinetics lit-pull synthesis (Mileykovskiy 2005, Lee 2005, Karnani 2020, Johnson 2012). Also targets V3-EXQ-471 catatonic lock-in resolution (SD-036 decay + SD-037 override jointly release sustained freeze).
